_publications._publicationTitle: Hexokinase 2 displacement from mitochondria-associated membranes prompts Ca

_contextSnippet: cl‐HK2pep does not perturb hexokinase enzymatic activity either on the purified enzyme (Fig 1 I) or on cell samples, where it is equally ineffective on HK2 and on the widespread isozyme HK1
details: cl-HK2pep does not affect hexokinase enzymatic activity in cell samples, equally ineffective on HK2 and HK1
